headline20: Critical operational constraints are flagged at 24 airports right now.
management45: Critical operational constraints are flagged at 24 airports right now. Engine anti-ice operations are flagged at Craiova (CRA/LRCV). Across base airports: 4 critical, 21 high, 5 medium, 9 normal. Key bases needing attention include London Luton (LTN/EGGW), Copernicus Wrocław (WRO/EPWR) and Chişinău (RMO/LUKK); plus 22 other bases. 5 additional base airports are at medium severity and should be monitored closely. At base airports, the dominant pattern is snow-related runway contamination risk, mist and low cloud base  — most notably around Craiova (CRA/LRCV), Iaşi (IAS/LRIA) and Gdańsk Lech Wałęsa (GDN/EPGD). Network hotspots: Craiova (CRA/LRCV), Bologna Guglielmo Marconi (BLQ/LIPE), Copenhagen Kastrup (CPH/EKCH), Malmö Sturup (MMX/ESMS), Alicante-Elche Miguel Hernández (ALC/LEAL) and 19 others. Primary drivers: low cloud base, cold‑temperature performance penalties and approach minima limits. Expected impact is reduced runway capacity with higher delay and diversion risk, especially where visibility/RVR and cloud base are very low. Since the last update, 12 airports changed status, led by Bologna Guglielmo Marconi (BLQ/LIPE), Copenhagen Kastrup (CPH/EKCH), Malmö Sturup (MMX/ESMS) and 9 others.
detail90: Critical operational constraints are flagged at 24 airports right now. Base airports (focus): London Luton (LTN/EGGW) — HIGH: fog; visibility down to 300 m, cloud base around 0 ft | Copernicus Wrocław (WRO/EPWR) — HIGH: mist; cloud base around 500 ft | Chişinău (RMO/LUKK) — HIGH: mist; visibility down to 1.5 km, cloud base around 300 ft | Iaşi (IAS/LRIA) — CRIT: freezing fog; cold-temperature performance penalties; visibility down to 200 m, RVR down to 550 m, cloud base around 100 ft | Tirana International Airport Mother Teresa (TIA/LATI) — HIGH: thunderstorm / convective risk | Bucharest Henri Coandă (OTP/LROP) — HIGH: fog; cold-temperature performance penalties; visibility down to 600 m, cloud base around 100 ft and 19 others. Worst affected now: Craiova (CRA/LRCV) — CRIT: freezing fog; freezing precipitation / icing risk; cold-temperature performance penalties (drivers: engine anti-ice operations, low-visibility procedures (reduced capacity), runway visual range (RVR) constraints) | Bologna Guglielmo Marconi (BLQ/LIPE) — CRIT: fog; visibility down to 50 m, RVR down to 375 m, cloud base around 100 ft; below approach minima (current METAR) (drivers: low-visibility procedures (reduced capacity), low-visibility takeoff restrictions, runway visual range (RVR) constraints) | Copenhagen Kastrup (CPH/EKCH) — CRIT: snow; cold-temperature performance penalties; visibility down to 1.2 km, cloud base around 500 ft (drivers: cold-temperature performance penalties, snow/blowing snow) | Malmö Sturup (MMX/ESMS) — CRIT: snow; cold-temperature performance penalties; visibility down to 1.2 km, cloud base around 400 ft (drivers: cold-temperature performance penalties, low ceilings, snow/blowing snow) | Alicante-Elche Miguel Hernández (ALC/LEAL) — CRIT: strong gusts risk (drivers: operational constraints) | Bordeaux–Mérignac (BOD/LFBD) — CRIT: strong gusts risk; visibility down to 1.4 km (drivers: thunderstorm/convective risk) and 18 others. Changed since last run: Bologna Guglielmo Marconi (BLQ/LIPE), Copenhagen Kastrup (CPH/EKCH), Malmö Sturup (MMX/ESMS), Alicante-Elche Miguel Hernández (ALC/LEAL), Hamburg Helmut Schmidt (HAM/EDDH), Leeds Bradford (LBA/EGNM), Kaunas (KUN/EYKA), Vilnius (VNO/EYVI), Josep Tarradellas Barcelona-El Prat (BCN/LEBL), Seve Ballesteros-Santander (SDR/LEXJ) and 2 others.
